# DaisyUI Prompt Kit

A React component library for AI chat interfaces, built with DaisyUI 5.5.14, React 19, and TailwindCSS 4.

## Installation

```bash
npm install @daisyui/prompt-kit
```

## Components

### PromptInput

AI input component with auto-resizing textarea.

```tsx
import { PromptInput, PromptInputTextarea, PromptInputActions, PromptInputAction } from '@daisyui/prompt-kit'

<PromptInput value={value} onValueChange={setValue} onSubmit={handleSubmit}>
  <PromptInputTextarea placeholder="Type message..." />
  <PromptInputActions>
    <PromptInputAction tooltip="Image"><ImageIcon /></PromptInputAction>
  </PromptInputActions>
</PromptInput>
```

### Message

Display messages with avatar, content, and actions.

```tsx
import { Message, MessageAvatar, MessageContent, MessageActions, MessageAction } from '@daisyui/prompt-kit'

<Message>
  <MessageAvatar fallback="AI" />
  <MessageContent>Hello!</MessageContent>
  <MessageActions>
    <MessageAction tooltip="Copy"><CopyIcon /></MessageAction>
  </MessageActions>
</Message>
```

### ChatContainer

Auto-scrolling chat container.

```tsx
import { ChatContainerRoot, ChatContainerContent, ScrollButton } from '@daisyui/prompt-kit'

<ChatContainerRoot>
  <ChatContainerContent>
    {messages.map(m => <Message key={m.id}>{m.content}</Message>)}
  </ChatContainerContent>
  <ScrollButton />
</ChatContainerRoot>
```

### CodeBlock

Syntax highlighted code display.

```tsx
import { CodeBlock, CodeBlockCode } from '@daisyui/prompt-kit'

<CodeBlock>
  <CodeBlockCode code={code} language="tsx" />
</CodeBlock>
```

### Markdown

Markdown rendering with code highlighting.

```tsx
import { Markdown } from '@daisyui/prompt-kit'

<Markdown>{markdownContent}</Markdown>
```

### Loader

Loading indicators.

```tsx
import { Loader } from '@daisyui/prompt-kit'

<Loader variant="circular" />
<Loader variant="dots" />
<Loader variant="typing" />
<Loader variant="wave" />
```

### Reasoning

Collapsible reasoning display.

```tsx
import { Reasoning, ReasoningTrigger, ReasoningContent } from '@daisyui/prompt-kit'

<Reasoning>
  <ReasoningTrigger>View Thinking</ReasoningTrigger>
  <ReasoningContent>Reasoning content...</ReasoningContent>
</Reasoning>
```

### PromptSuggestion

Prompt suggestion buttons.

```tsx
import { PromptSuggestion } from '@daisyui/prompt-kit'

<PromptSuggestion>Explain hooks</PromptSuggestion>
<PromptSuggestion highlight="React">Build React app</PromptSuggestion>
```

### Tool

Tool call visualization.

```tsx
import { Tool } from '@daisyui/prompt-kit'

<Tool toolPart={{ type: 'search', state: 'completed', toolCallId: '1' }} />
```

### Steps

Progress steps component.

```tsx
import { Steps } from '@daisyui/prompt-kit'

<Steps steps={[
  { id: '1', title: 'Step 1', status: 'completed' },
  { id: '2', title: 'Step 2', status: 'loading' },
]} />
```

### SystemMessage

Alert messages.

```tsx
import { SystemMessage } from '@daisyui/prompt-kit'

<SystemMessage variant="info">Info message</SystemMessage>
<SystemMessage variant="success">Success!</SystemMessage>
<SystemMessage variant="warning">Warning</SystemMessage>
<SystemMessage variant="error">Error!</SystemMessage>
```

### TextShimmer

Animated shimmer text.

```tsx
import { TextShimmer } from '@daisyui/prompt-kit'

<TextShimmer text="Loading..." />
```

### ThinkingBar

AI thinking indicator.

```tsx
import { ThinkingBar } from '@daisyui/prompt-kit'

<ThinkingBar isThinking={true} />
```
